title: Improve state and gate blocking remediation
description:
Make state-transition and gate-blocking failures actionable so users and agents know what prevented progress and exactly what to run next.

## Background

CLI usability planning identified gate and state-transition failures as the highest-value error UX target after version provenance. The goal is to improve blocked completion, claim, and state-change flows before broadening to validation, document, or ID-resolution errors.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] State-transition failures caused by pending dependencies or gates identify each blocker clearly.
- [ ] Human-readable errors include concrete next commands for inspecting or resolving blockers.
- [ ] JSON error output includes structured blocker/remediation fields suitable for MCP and agent consumers.
- [ ] Existing successful transition behavior is unchanged.
- [ ] Tests cover at least one gate-blocked transition and one dependency-blocked transition.
